response.justification: While Bogdan possesses a very strong technical background with extensive experience in software architecture and open-source technologies, he falls short of the executive-level leadership requirements for this Head of Development role. Most critically, the position strictly requires a minimum of C1 German proficiency for client advisory, whereas Bogdan only has basic German skills. His background is primarily as a Senior/Staff Individual Contributor rather than an executive team leader.
strengths: Extensive technical experience designing and building modern, event-driven, and microservices-based architectures.
Deep commitment to open-source technologies, demonstrated by founding GISCollective and creating various open-source libraries.
Proven track record of technical mentorship, including organizing coding dojos, workshops, and speaking at conferences.
concerns: Does not meet the mandatory C1 German language requirement, possessing only basic German skills.
Lacks formal executive-level leadership and team management experience, having primarily held Senior and Staff Engineer titles.
Missing demonstrated consulting experience in IT security, risk management, compliance, and formal UML modeling.
